description_long: This is a sealed, rectangular plastic bag of Faragello Half Fried Falafel, featuring a vibrant front design with images of falafel balls, fresh herbs, and vegetables. The front of the package prominently displays the Faragello brand logo in red and white, along with product information in both English and Arabic. The back of the bag contains detailed nutritional facts, ingredients, and multilingual product descriptions. The sides of the bag are narrow and show partial graphics of vegetables and herbs, with one side displaying a barcode and additional text. The packaging appears to be slightly inflated, suggesting the presence of air inside to protect the contents. The overall color scheme is predominantly white with green, red, and brown accents from the food imagery and branding.
description: A white, rectangular plastic bag of Faragello Half Fried Falafel with colorful food imagery and detailed branding, sealed and slightly inflated.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Faragello logo, product name in English and Arabic, and appetizing images of falafel and herbs.
description_view_1: The left side view is narrow, showing partial graphics of vegetables and herbs, with minimal text visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays nutritional facts, ingredients, and multilingual product information, along with a smaller Faragello logo.
description_view_3: The right side view is also narrow, featuring partial graphics and some text, including a visible onion illustration.
attribute_brand_logo: The Faragello brand logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a stylized red 'F' with white highlights and the word 'Faragello' in white on a red background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package shows images of falafel, parsley, and vegetables, and the text 'Half Fried Falafel' in English and Arabic, indicating a falafel flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories and other nutritional information.
